intended_use: PIUR tUS Infinity is a computer-aided detection device intended to assist and support medical professionals in the diagnostic workflow of thyroid and thyroid nodules acquired from FDA-cleared ultrasou
intended_use_full: PIUR tUS Infinity is a computer-aided detection device intended to assist and support medical professionals in the diagnostic workflow of thyroid and thyroid nodules acquired from FDA-cleared ultrasound systems, including image documentation, analysis, and reporting. The device supports the physician with additional information during image review, including quantification and visualization of sonographic characteristics of thyroid nodules.
ground_truth: annotated datasets labeled by medical specialists; ROI labeled by a panel of specialists
other_metrics: Volume measurement validation using standardized (%) absolute inter-observer differences, Lin's Concordance Correlation Coefficient, and Mean Squared Error; ACR TI-RADS classification validation using Weighted Cohen's Kappa coefficient (196 patients across multiple ethnicities and 7 ultrasound models); sub-parameter assessment using Weighted Cohen's Kappa Coefficients and Limits of Agreement (102 patients).
